recent.author: Pulse
recent.snippet: *Renewal Proximity* in the Pulse score measures how close an account is to their renewal date. It's worth up to 15 points out of 100. Here's how it works: • >180 days until renewal → 15 points (full) • 90-180 days → 12 points • 60-90 days → 8 points • 30-60 days → 5 points • &

recent.author: Pulse
recent.snippet: *Renewal Radar* is a dashboard widget showing upcoming renewals in three time buckets: • *0–90 days* — renewals in the next 3 months • *90–180 days* — renewals 3–6 months out • *180–365 days* — renewals 6–12 months out Each bucket shows account count, total ARR, risk distribution

recent.author: Pulse
recent.snippet: Pulse health score is a *0–100 composite* based on five pillars: • *Predict Risk* (0–30): Worst churn score across open opportunities (Critical→0, Minimal→30) • *Product Adoption* (0–25): Module adoption level (High→25, No Usage→2) • *Engagement* (0–20): Days since last Pendo vis

recent.author: Pulse
recent.snippet: The *canary chips* you see in Pulse are *risk-level badges* that display Canary's assessment of each account. The colors/labels (e.g., Stable, Low, Medium, High, Critical) show how risky that account is based on usage & health signals. • *Stable* = healthy, low-risk • *Low/Me
